system.notes:
Abilities

  • Regeneration: If the radhound is alive, at the start of each Combat Turn it heals 2 damage. If its current damage is reduced to less than its Health, it immediately regains consciousness. If the radhound’s damage exceeds its Health x 2, it dies.
  • Swift: The radhound can take the Run action as a Minor Action, and the Move Action as a Free action (but can still only take each once per Combat Turn). The radhound does not suffer Liability on tests when they take the Run action.

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Low-Light, Thermographic
  • Pack Hunter: A radhound has Leverage on any attack
  • tests against a target in melee range of another:
  • radhound.:
